Featured Prompts

Hand-picked prompts that deliver results

SEO Blog Post Writer

Generate a complete, SEO-optimized blog post with headings and meta description

ChatGPT
Act as an expert SEO content writer. Create a comprehensive blog post about [TOPIC] that:

1. Starts with a compelling hook in the introduction
2. Uses H2 and H3 subheadings for structure
3. Includes ...
blogseo

Professional Email Rewriter

Transform rough notes into polished, professional emails

ChatGPT
Rewrite the following email to make it professional, clear, and effective:

[EMAIL DRAFT]

Requirements:
- Professional but approachable tone
- Clear subject line suggestion
- Structured with proper g...
emailprofessional

Viral Twitter/X Thread

Create engaging Twitter threads that drive engagement

ChatGPT
Create a viral Twitter/X thread about [TOPIC]:

Structure:
1. Hook tweet (attention-grabbing, 280 chars)
2. 5-7 value-packed tweets
3. One controversial or surprising tweet
4. Strong final tweet with ...
twittersocial

LinkedIn Post Generator

Create professional LinkedIn posts that drive engagement

ChatGPT
Write a LinkedIn post about [TOPIC/EXPERIENCE]:

Format:
- Hook (first 2 lines must grab attention)
- Short paragraphs (1-2 sentences each)
- Personal story or lesson learned
- Actionable insights (3 ...
linkedinprofessional

Newsletter Edition Writer

Write engaging newsletter content with subject line and structure

ChatGPT
Create a newsletter edition about [TOPIC]:

Include:
1. Subject line (high open rate potential)
2. Preview text (under 100 chars)
3. Opening hook (personal, engaging)
4. Main content (300-500 words)
 ...

High-Converting Headlines

Generate 10 headline variations for any content

ChatGPT
Create 10 headline variations for: [CONTENT DESCRIPTION]

Mix of styles:
- 2 curiosity-driven headlines
- 2 benefit-focused headlines
- 2 how-to headlines
- 2 listicle headlines
- 2 question headlines...

Code Debugger & Explainer

Debug code and explain the solution in simple terms

ChatGPT
I have this code that's not working:

[CODE]

Error message: [ERROR]

Please:
1. Identify the bug(s)
2. Provide the corrected code
3. Explain what was wrong and why
4. Suggest best practices to avoid ...
